title: Monsoon Crunchy Corned Beef Wrap
description: A refreshing and flavorful wrap featuring corned beef, pickles, and a touch of dairy-free cheese, perfect for snacking on a rainy day.
instructions: Place corned beef, pickles, and cheese on one whole wheat tortilla.
Add a few lettuces leaves between the fillings for extra freshness and crunch.
Sprinkle cilantro over the top if desired.
Fold in half and place seam side down onto a baking sheet.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until wrap is warm and cheese is melted.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
